## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This PR targets `main` from a feature branch (no direct pushes to `main`).
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run test:ci` passes locally, and **code coverage did not drop below the configured thresholds**.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the modules I changed.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal information are included.
